note: Real utility/domain source, fetched at the pinned commit by harness/fetch_vendored.py into corpus/.cache/ (never checked in). files maps upstream path -> app-relative destination. Pinned right before three real merged upstream PRs (#638 DateExt.isFuture, #724 NumberExt infix, #732 StringExt any-RTL) so edits/01-03 apply as clean forward patches. Edits that touch fetched files are checked in as .patch files against the pinned commit and applied at materialization.
